app.name: WFM Custom Data Exporter
app.long_description: Select a date range and export the WFM schedule (published or current draft view) and approved time off as a pivoted CSV.
app.installation_instructions: Optional: set the maximum selectable date-range length in days (default 31), and enable the Debug button for troubleshooting.

max_range_days.label: Maximum date range (days)
max_range_days.helpText: Largest date range a user can select, in days. Defaults to 31 (about one month).

export_timezone.label: Export time zone
export_timezone.helpText: IANA time zone (e.g. Europe/Warsaw, UTC, America/New_York) used for shift times and day columns, so the export matches the WFM UI. Defaults to Europe/Warsaw.

show_debug_button.label: Show Debug button
show_debug_button.helpText: Adds a Debug button that downloads raw WFM API responses for troubleshooting. Off by default.
